title: Config & Validation Bundle

source_items.title: LLM provider registry with capability flags and credential validation
Config cache with invalidation for hot-reloadable settings
Versioned config migration with forward-compatible schema chain
Strict WORKFLOW.md validation with unknown key rejection
Tiered git identity resolution chain for Docker workers

grouping_rationale: All six issues harden the same raw-config -> validation -> cached service config -> runtime consumer boundary.
architectural_drift: WORKFLOW.md is a legacy import source, not the primary runtime config path.
ConfigStore already caches resolved config snapshots; missing behavior is explicit invalidation and hot-reload coverage for long-lived consumers.
Provider support today is Codex-centric and custom-provider-based, so provider registry work must not assume a new dispatcher layer.
